title: poa pratensis subsp. jordanii
intro: Poa pratensis subsp. jordanii, also known as Jordan's meadow-grass, is a subspecies of the perennial grass Poa pratensis. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Jordan's meadow-grass include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Jordan's meadow-grass can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
